name: gropmng-root-scss-proxy
description: Root-level npm scripts that proxy SCSS commands to Presentation/GropMng.Web

scripts.build:css: npm run build:core && npm run build:themes
scripts.build:themes: sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-bordered.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-bordered.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-bordered-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-bordered-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-default.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-default.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-default-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-default-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-grop-mng.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-grop-mng.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-grop-mng-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-grop-mng-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-raspberry.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-raspberry.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-raspberry-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-raspberry-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-semi-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-semi-dark.css && sass -q --load-path=Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/node_modules Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/scss/theme-semi-dark-dark.scss Presentation/GropMng.Web/wwwroot/vendor/css/theme-semi-dark-dark.css
